BJ.name: Beijing
BJ.intro: China's capital and political center, home to 3,000 years of history. The Forbidden City, Great Wall, and hutong alleys offer an unmatched blend of imperial grandeur and local life.

SH.name: Shanghai
SH.intro: China's most cosmopolitan city, where Art Deco heritage meets futuristic skyscrapers. Known for its food scene, nightlife, and as a gateway to water towns.

XA.name: Xi'an
XA.intro: The ancient starting point of the Silk Road and home to the Terracotta Warriors. The Muslim Quarter offers some of China's best street food.

CQ.name: Chongqing
CQ.intro: China's cyberpunk megacity built on mountains where two rivers meet. Famous worldwide on TikTok for its vertiginous skyline, hotpot, and surreal urban landscapes where trains pass through apartment buildings.
